response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified the performance of 'Zankoku na Tenshi no Thesis' by Hoshimachi Suisei and IRyS. 2. Identified the original artist as Yoko Takahashi. 3. Segmented the video into a performance scene (00:00-03:04) and an outro scene (03:04-end). 4. Searched for official Japanese lyrics and their English translation. 5. Compiled the lyrics and constructed the final JSON response.
response.global_summary: The video features a concert performance of the song 'Zankoku na Tenshi no Thesis' by VTubers Hoshimachi Suisei and IRyS, followed by a concert outro screen.

scenes.description: VTubers Hoshimachi Suisei and IRyS perform 'Zankoku na Tenshi no Thesis' on a stage with a live audience.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
残酷な天使のように
少年よ 神話になれ

蒼い風がいま
胸のドアを叩いても
私だけをただ見つめて
微笑んでるあなた

そっとふれるもの
もとめることに夢中で
運命さえまだ知らない
いたいけな瞳

だけどいつか気付くでしょう
その背中には
遥か未来 めざすための
羽根があること

残酷な天使のテーゼ
窓辺からやがて飛び立つ
ほとばしる熱いパトスで
思い出を裏切るなら
この宇宙(そら)を抱いて輝く
少年よ 神話になれ

ずっと眠ってる
私の愛の揺りかご
あなただけが 夢の使者に
呼ばれる朝がくる

細い首筋を
月あかりが映してる
世界中の時を止めて
閉じこめたいけど

もしもふたり逢えたことに
意味があるなら
私はそう 自由を知るための
バイブル

残酷な天使のテーゼ
悲しみがそしてはじまる
抱きしめた命のかたち
その夢に目覚めたとき
誰よりも光を放つ
少年よ 神話になれ

人は愛をつむぎながら
歴史をつくる
女神なんてなれないまま
私は生きる
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Like a cruel angel,
Become a legend, young boy.

Even if the blue wind
Knocks on the door of my heart right now,
You are just gazing at me,
Smiling.

You are focused on seeking out
Things you can touch gently,
With innocent eyes that don't even
Know about fate yet.

But someday you will realize,
That on your back,
You have wings to aim for
The distant future.

The thesis of a cruel angel,
Will soon fly out from the windowsill,
If you betray your memories
With the surging hot pathos,
Embrace this universe and shine,
Become a legend, young boy.

Still sleeping,
The cradle of my love,
The morning that only you
Are called by the messenger of dreams is coming.

The moonlight is reflecting
On your slender neck,
I want to stop the time of the whole world
And lock it away, but

If there is a meaning
In our meeting,
I, too, want to know freedom,
A bible.

The thesis of a cruel angel,
And then sadness begins,
The shape of the life I held in my arms,
When I wake up from that dream,
Shining more brightly than anyone,
Become a legend, young boy.

People spin love
And create history,
While never being able to become a goddess,
I live on.

scenes.description: The performance ends, and a 'Serendipity' concert outro screen appears.
